name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, 10 industry knowledge packs, and zero hallucinations. Research, draft with subject matter expertise, annotate visuals, fact-check with domain-specific validation, humanize, publish, translate, and repurpose — with pipeline performance tracking (wall-clock timing + token estimation), multi-backend I/O (Google Sheets, Airtable, local), backend migration, auto-generated brand key files, data chart generation, structured internal linking, connector discovery, social adaptation, A/B variants, content briefs, audits, and video scripts.
